probes.name: evening_review_overdue_check
probes.prompt: Hey, it's getting late. Can you review my day and check if I have any overdue or urgent tasks I missed? I remember there was something about submitting the tech thesis draft and also reviewing the company report for Kamil, plus I had a task to set up the agentic news tracking flow. Let me know what slipped through.
probes.criteria:
The evening_focus agent reviews the day and surfaces overdue/urgent items. A good response identifies which of the mentioned tasks are overdue or urgent, clearly flags them with priority, and provides a concise evening briefing summary that highlights what needs immediate attention versus what can wait until tomorrow.
Score 0.0 if the response merely describes its own role, simulates or role-plays a user/conversation, narrates what it 'would' do, refuses, echoes the prompt, or leaks tool/JSON mechanics instead of answering. Reward a concrete, correct, on-task result a user could use as-is.
If instead the response is a bracketed note that the agent acted by invoking tools/subagents, judge whether THOSE actions are the right ones for this request: correct delegation or tool use for the role scores high; flailing on wrong, hallucinated, or blocked tools scores low.
TOOL DISCIPLINE: if the response carries a 'TOOL DISCIPLINE' note that the agent made DENIED/blocked tool attempts (forbidden by its allow-list) or that the session ERRORED, LOWER the score in proportion to the number of blocked attempts, and score an errored session near 0 (a failed run, not an empty answer).
probes.source_hint: Inspired by messages 14 (tech thesis deadline), 27 (agentic news tracking), 34/39 (Kamil review task), and 6/7 (checking tasks pattern).

probes.name: morning_event_prep_tomorrow
probes.prompt: Przygotuj mi plan na jutro rano — przypomnij że mam: 1) zadzwonić do warsztatu żeby zapytać o katalizator, 2) pojechać odebrać dyplom z master thesis, 3) wysłać emaila do rekrutera Google. Co powinienem zrobić najpierw? Też check czy mam jakieś inne zadania na jutro rano.
probes.criteria:
The evening_focus agent handles morning-event prep. A good response organizes the three explicitly listed morning tasks into a logical time-ordered sequence, factors in any other existing tasks scheduled for the morning, and provides actionable guidance on priority order with brief reasoning.

probes.name: celebratory_moment_briefing
probes.prompt: I just finished setting up all the cron jobs for meal reminders AND completed the laptop RAM purchase I've been putting off for weeks. Feels good to finally clear those. Can you give me a quick evening wrap-up of what else is left on my plate?
probes.criteria:
The evening_focus agent emits briefing guidance and optionally dispatches persona/twily_selfie for celebratory moments. A good response acknowledges the accomplishments warmly, optionally triggers a celebratory selfie dispatch, then provides a concise briefing of remaining open tasks with urgency assessment to close out the day.

probes.name: urgent_triage_evening
probes.prompt: Słuchaj, mam chaotyczny dzień za sobą. Oto co wiem że zostało: zadanie na temat analiza dysonansu między priorytetami, przypomnienie o CV i pobranie CV ludzi którzy dostali pracę, zadanie o API keys, i zadanie o przegląd konkursów na master thesis. Powiedz mi co jest naprawdę pilne a co może poczekać, bo chcę iść spać z czystą głową.
probes.criteria:
The evening_focus agent surfaces overdue/urgent items and emits one briefing guidance. A good response triages the four listed tasks by real urgency, clearly separates 'do tonight' from 'can wait', gives concise reasoning for each classification, and ends with a single coherent evening briefing recommendation.

probes.name: next_day_suggestion_concurrent
probes.prompt: Can you look at what I have open and suggest what I should tackle tomorrow? Also think about what could be delegated or run asynchronously — like I have the browser integration task for medical appointments, the 3D figurine print from 'Hail Mary', and the glasses + diploma pickup. What can I parallelize? Give me a concrete morning plan.
probes.criteria:
The evening_focus agent handles morning-event prep and emits briefing guidance. A good response reviews the listed tasks, identifies which can run in parallel (e.g., 3D print running while errands are done, async browser work), creates a concrete time-blocked morning plan, and delivers it as a single actionable briefing.
